codeReview.summary: Pass. The feature fulfills VAL-SETUP-005 and VAL-SETUP-006: `PackagingSizeMappingRequest` now makes the core write fields required, `PackagingMaterialService` rejects blank sizes, invalid or non-packaging raw materials, and duplicate mappings on create/update, `PackagingMappingController` keeps writes admin-only while allowing admin/factory reads, and the service/tests preserve the full-list vs active-list lifecycle split. The refreshed OpenAPI snapshot also exposes the required request fields and the DTO active flag on the published packaging-mappings surface.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The mission service catalog does not yet include the new packaging permission proof, so future setup-truth runs that rely on `.factory/services.yaml` will miss the packaging-mappings security contract unless they remember to add a custom Maven test selector.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff verification for session `5be91956-4966-4eda-a15e-ee254b2036b0` ran `MIGRATION_SET=v2 mvn -Djacoco.skip=true -Dtest=PackagingMaterialServiceTest,PackagingMappingControllerSecurityContractTest test`; `.factory/services.yaml` command `erp38-targeted-setup` still lists only `CatalogControllerCanonicalProductIT,CatalogServiceCanonicalCoverageTest,ProductionCatalogServiceCanonicalEntryTest,SkuReadinessServiceTest,PackagingMaterialServiceTest`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: OpenAPI refresh is currently tribal knowledge rather than a named repo command. The worker had to inspect `OpenApiSnapshotIT` and invoke a bespoke Maven line to refresh `openapi.json` before the drift guard could pass.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton shows reads/greps against `erp-domain/src/test/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/OpenApiSnapshotIT.java` followed by `MIGRATION_SET=v2 mvn -Djacoco.skip=true -Dtest=OpenApiSnapshotIT -Derp.openapi.snapshot.verify=true -Derp.openapi.snapshot.refresh=true test`; `.factory/services.yaml` contains `guard_openapi_contract_drift.sh` but no corresponding OpenAPI refresh command.

summary: Scrutiny passed for `setup-packaging-rule-validation-and-lifecycle`. I found no blocking or non-blocking product-code defects in the feature diff; the main follow-ups are shared-state gaps in `.factory/services.yaml` around the new packaging security test and the OpenAPI snapshot refresh command.
